Patch Set 1:

Sorry I am not that familiar with this, can you explain say a few words what does a "helm endpoint" mean per commit tittle, and what it is trying to accomplish in this review related to seccom output?   Thank you and bear with me while trying to understand what is being done.

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> Sorry I am not that familiar with this, can you explain say a few words what does a "helm endpoint" mean per commit tittle, and what it is trying to accomplish in this review related to seccom output?   Thank you and bear with me while trying to understand what is being done.

Hi Jorge, To enable cluster-admin role privileges for k8s-participant helm chart in OOM, SECCOM has few security concerns on the existing implementation. One of the them was to disable the exposed REST endpoints in the k8s-participant module for deploying helm charts by external users. By disabling it, the module will have only single point of invocation from CLAMP Control loop runtime. The endpoints can be enabled in the properties file for any internal testing purposes.
